✈ SkyQuiz
Knowledge Flight Challenge

How to Play
⬆️⬇️⬅️➡️

Arrastra la pantalla con el dedo para mover la nave

🟢

Fly into the correct balloons (1, 2 or 3 per question). Miss one? It loops back around.

🔴

Avoid wrong balloons, birds 🐦 and walls 🧱

🐢

Globo cian = guarda 🐢 (botón 🐢): frena todo al 25% por 3s

🛡

Globo dorado = guarda 🛡 (botón 🛡): 6s de inmunidad total

⚡

Cada 3 preguntas = carga de DASH (botón ⚡DASH): rompe muros, breve invencibilidad

💖

5-answer streak = extra life. Below 3 lives, hearts appear in the sky

⏸

Botón ⏸ = pausa

✈ How to Fly
Arrastra con el dedo donde quieras en la pantalla — aparece un joystick donde tocas. Mueve la nave en cualquier dirección.
💡 La nave tiene inercia — suelta el dedo y frena gradualmente.
🔵 Knowledge Orbs
Each question has 1, 2 or 3 correct answers. Fly into the orbs that show the correct answers. The HUD shows 0/2 hits — collect all correct orbs to advance.

Wrong orbs make you lose a life and reset your streak. If you miss an orb it loops back — don't panic!
💡 Wrong orbs are mixed in. Read carefully before flying into one!
⚠ Dangers
🧱 Walls — fly through the gap. Some walls are completely solid — you must use DASH.
🐦 Birds — dodge them. They speed up later and some dive diagonally.
💀 Enemy ship — appears from the left, shoots cannon balls at you and bullets at your correct orbs.
💡 A red ⚠ on the left edge warns you the enemy is about to arrive.
⚡ DASH Power
Cada 3 preguntas completadas ganas una carga de DASH (máx 3).

Toca el botón ⚡DASH para lanzarte a alta velocidad por 0.8 segundos. Durante el DASH eres invencible y puedes romper cualquier muro — incluso los sólidos!
🧱 A solid DASH wall appears at Q12 and Q19. Save a charge for it!
🐢 🛡 Power-Ups
Power-up orbs float in the sky. Fly into them to store them in your inventory (max 3 each).

🐢 Orbe cian → guarda un Slow. Toca el botón 🐢 para activarlo: frena todo al 25% por 3 segundos.
🛡 Orbe dorado → guarda un Escudo. Toca el botón 🛡: 6 segundos de inmunidad total — ¡nada puede hacerte daño!
💡 The Shield also blocks the enemy cannonball and the solid wall damage.
❤️ Lives & Streak
You start with 4 lives. Lose them all and the game ends.

Build a streak by answering questions without mistakes. Every 5 correct in a row earns you an extra life.

With 2 or fewer lives, emergency ❤️ hearts appear in the sky — grab them quickly before they disappear!
🎯 Aim for a streak of 5+ to recover lives as you play!
▶ Tap anywhere to continue
